message:
feat: add JIT backend for runtime compilation

Implement JIT compilation via zig build-lib + dlopen:
- jitCompileSource() writes Zig to temp file, compiles to .dylib/.so
- CompiledFunction now stores DynLib handle and lib path for cleanup
- Add call() method for batch processing signature
- Graceful fallback to source-only mode if JIT unavailable
- Add test-codegen build step for JIT module tests
- Fix Zig 0.15 API: ArrayListUnmanaged, alignCast
